content:
「咕湧…咕湧……」身軀…被融蝕吞食著，當它的聲帶也融蝕為灰燼後，塞勒菲斯漁村終於歸於寂靜——整座村莊再無一活物。

污穢雕塑、邪惡祭祀、被血浸染的詭異陣法——
「奧瑞塔出現在塞勒菲斯漁村」
「這個雕塑是奧瑞塔送的禮物」
……
漁村厄運的源頭都指向了你──奧瑞塔，我的朋友，但真的是你嗎……

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

"Gulu...Gulu..." The body...was devoured by dissolution, and when its vocal cords were dissolution reduced to ashes, Celephaïs's Fishing Village finally returned to silence - there was no living creature in the entire village.

Filthy sculptures, evil sacrifices, and strange formations stained with blood -
"Aurita appeared in the Celephaïs's Fishing Village"
"This sculpture is a gift from Aurita"
...
The source of the fishing village's misfortune all points to you - Aurita, my friend, but is it really you...
thread_title: 🎊週年活動劇情預告：窺覷神國的陰影┊Anniversary event plot preview: Glimpse Beyond Sanctum
